offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late filings. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating accurate tax compliance reports from sales data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Etsy sellers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users generate monthly tax compliance reports for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
